payload.answer: Recall filtered mem_old because it has been superseded by mem_new. The system preserves durable memory by retaining only the current valid state (mem_new) and excluding obsolete records (mem_old) from results, preventing stale information from being presented as fact.
citations: Memory system principle: never present superseded/deleted facts as current
Recall filtering logic: exclude records marked as superseded
payload.decision: mem_new retained, mem_old filtered due to supersession

entity_resolution.reason: mem_new represents the most recent and authoritative information; mem_old is marked as superseded and must not be presented as current fact

payload.intent: Explain recall filtering decision for Sam from Goldman

memory_cards.statement: mem_new contains current information about Sam from Goldman
mem_old is superseded by mem_new and therefore excluded from recall results

details: Filtering decision applied correctly per durable memory protocol

repair_options: Verify mem_new contains complete and accurate information about Sam from Goldman
Confirm supersession relationship is correctly marked in system
Audit mem_old to understand why it was superseded
